NAME.error:
Error: Command failed: turso db shell moodboard-db ".mode json" "SELECT * FROM NAME"
Error: accepts between 1 and 2 arg(s), received 3
Usage:
  turso db shell <database-name | replica-url> [sql] [flags]

Examples:
  turso db shell http://127.0.0.1:8080
  turso db shell name-of-my-amazing-db
  turso db shell name-of-my-amazing-db --location yyz
  turso db shell name-of-my-amazing-db --instance a-specific-instance
  turso db shell name-of-my-amazing-db "select * from users;"

Flags:
      --attach strings                 list of database names with attach claim to be added to the token
  -h, --help                           help for shell
      --instance string                Connect to the database at the specified instance.
      --location string                Connect to the database at the specified location.
      --proxy string                   Proxy to use for the connection.
      --remote-encryption-key string   Encryption key (in base64) for accessing encrypted databases on Turso cloud

Global Flags:
  -c, --config-path string   Path to the directory with config file
